orchestrator.name: etl_orchestrator
orchestrator.description: ETL Orchestration: S3 Stale Detection -> Glue Trigger -> Validation -> Audit & Dashboard Email
orchestrator.run_mode_options_doc: full_pipeline = stale check + glue trigger + validations | validation_only = skip stale check & glue, run validations directly

queries.name: row_count_check
queries.description: Verify rows were loaded into the product detail table for today
queries.query: select count(*) as cnt  from membership_base_prod.member_product_detail_base where substring(cast(load_timestamp as varchar), 1, 10) = cast(date_add('day', -1, current_date) AS varchar)

queries.name: row_count_check
queries.description: Verify counts of Household table for today
queries.query: select count(*) as cnt from membership_base_prod.household_members_base where substring(cast(load_timestamp as varchar), 1, 10) = cast(date_add('day', -1, current_date) AS varchar) or  substring( cast(update_timestamp as varchar), 1, 10) = cast(date_add('day', -1, current_date) AS varchar)

queries.name: mrd_mbr_prd_dtl_vs_member_product_detail_base_reconciliation
queries.description: Validate that all member product detail records from mrd_mbr_prd_dtl (yesterday) exist in member_product_detail_base using a normalized business key comparison
queries.query: WITH t1_raw AS (SELECT * FROM membership_datalake_prod.mrd_mbr_prd_dtl WHERE substring(cast(load_timestamp AS varchar),1,10) = cast(date_add('day',-1,current_date) AS varchar)), t1 AS (SELECT *, concat_ws('^', coalesce(trim(fk_mhh_mbrshp_n),''), coalesce(trim(fk_mpr_acl_club_c),''), coalesce(trim(fk_mpr_prd_c),''), coalesce(trim(fk_mpr_mro_role_c),''), coalesce(trim(fk_mbr_eff_d),''), coalesce(cast(try_cast(eff_d AS date) AS varchar),''), coalesce(trim(chg_eff_s),''), coalesce(cast(dn_cust_sys_id_n AS varchar),'')) AS concat_key FROM t1_raw), t2_raw AS (SELECT * FROM membership_base_prod.member_product_detail_base WHERE substring(cast(load_timestamp AS varchar),1,10) = cast(date_add('day',-1,current_date) AS varchar)), t2 AS (SELECT *, concat_ws('^', coalesce(trim(member_number),''), coalesce(trim(club_code),''), coalesce(trim(product_code),''), coalesce(trim(role_code),''), coalesce(trim(member_effective_date),''), coalesce(cast(try_cast(record_effective_date AS date) AS varchar),''), coalesce(trim(transaction_timestamp),''), coalesce(cast(customer_id AS varchar),'')) AS concat_key FROM t2_raw)  SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM t1 LEFT JOIN t2 ON t1.concat_key = t2.concat_key WHERE t2.concat_key IS NULL

queries.name: member_product_detail_base_daily_duplicate_check
queries.description: Detect duplicate member product detail records in member_product_detail_base for yesterday based on full business key
queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM (SELECT 1 FROM membership_base_prod.member_product_detail_base WHERE substring(cast(load_timestamp AS varchar),1,10) = cast(date_add('day',-1,current_date) AS varchar) GROUP BY club_code, member_number, customer_id, role_code, product_code, term_effective_date, term_expiration_date, member_effective_date, record_effective_date, transaction_timestamp, paid_flag HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) dup

queries.name: member_product_detail_base_daily_completeness_check
queries.description: Validate completeness of mandatory fields in member_product_detail_base for today's load; fails if any required field is NULL
queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM membership_base_prod.member_product_detail_base WHERE substring(cast(load_timestamp AS varchar),1,10) = cast(current_date AS varchar) AND (club_code IS NULL OR member_number IS NULL OR role_code IS NULL OR customer_id IS NULL OR product_code IS NULL OR term_effective_date IS NULL OR term_expiration_date IS NULL)

queries.name: member_product_detail_base_daily_minmax_year_validation
queries.description: Validate tenure and join year fields are populated and within acceptable range (1900–2100) for today's loaded or updated records in member_product_detail_base
queries.query: WITH params AS (SELECT '1900' AS min_year, '2100' AS max_year) SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM membership_base_prod.member_product_detail_base t CROSS JOIN params WHERE (substring(cast(load_timestamp AS varchar),1,10) = cast(current_date AS varchar) OR substring(cast(update_timestamp AS varchar),1,10) = cast(current_date AS varchar)) AND (tenure_aaa_year IS NULL OR club_join_year IS NULL OR club_join_year < params.min_year OR club_join_year > params.max_year OR aaa_join_year IS NULL OR aaa_join_year < params.min_year OR aaa_join_year > params.max_year)

queries.name: member_product_detail_base_invalid_club_code
queries.description: Validate club_code is present and within approved values for today's load
queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM membership_base_prod.member_product_detail_base WHERE substring(cast(load_timestamp AS varchar),1,10) = cast(current_date AS varchar) AND (club_code IS NULL OR club_code NOT IN ('001','004','601','018','036','065','252','258','215'))

queries.name: member_product_detail_base_invalid_role_code
queries.description: Validate role_code is present and within approved values for today's load or update
queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM membership_base_prod.member_product_detail_base WHERE (substring(cast(load_timestamp AS varchar),1,10) = cast(current_date AS varchar) OR substring(cast(update_timestamp AS varchar),1,10) = cast(current_date AS varchar)) AND (role_code IS NULL OR role_code NOT IN ('00','01','02','03','04','05','06'))

queries.name: member_product_detail_base_invalid_product_code
queries.description: Validate product_code is present and within approved values for today's load
queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM membership_base_prod.member_product_detail_base WHERE substring(cast(load_timestamp AS varchar),1,10) = cast(current_date AS varchar) AND (product_code IS NULL OR product_code NOT IN ('10','01','11','12','14','15','80','20','90'))

queries.name: member_product_detail_base_business_type_code_quality
queries.description: Validate business_type_code quality using percentage threshold (20%) over records loaded 5 days ago
queries.query: WITH params AS (SELECT 0.20 AS pass_threshold), today_rows AS (SELECT * FROM membership_base_prod.member_product_detail_base WHERE substr(cast(load_timestamp AS varchar),1,10) = cast(date_add('day',-5,current_date) AS varchar)), counts AS (SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_today, SUM(CASE WHEN business_type_code IS NULL OR business_type_code NOT IN ('RAC','REN','NEW','RAH','MYA','REI') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS invalid_count FROM today_rows), result AS (SELECT total_today, invalid_count, CASE WHEN total_today = 0 THEN 0.0 ELSE ROUND(100.0 * invalid_count / total_today,2) END AS invalid_pct, CASE WHEN total_today = 0 THEN 'NO_DATA' WHEN (CAST(invalid_count AS double)/total_today) <= pass_threshold THEN 'PASS' ELSE 'FAIL' END AS status FROM counts CROSS JOIN params) SELECT * FROM result

queries.name: member_product_detail_base_reason_type_code_quality
queries.description: Validate reason_type_code quality using percentage threshold (20%) over records loaded 5 days ago
queries.query: WITH params AS (SELECT 0.20 AS pass_threshold), today_rows AS (SELECT * FROM membership_base_prod.member_product_detail_base WHERE substr(cast(load_timestamp AS varchar),1,10) = cast(date_add('day',-5,current_date) AS varchar)), counts AS (SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_today, SUM(CASE WHEN reason_type_code IS NULL OR reason_type_code NOT IN ('509','501','504','508','080','054','500') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS invalid_count FROM today_rows), result AS (SELECT total_today, invalid_count, CASE WHEN total_today = 0 THEN 0.0 ELSE ROUND(100.0 * invalid_count / total_today,2) END AS invalid_pct, CASE WHEN total_today = 0 THEN 'NO_DATA' WHEN (CAST(invalid_count AS double)/total_today) <= pass_threshold THEN 'PASS' ELSE 'FAIL' END AS status FROM counts CROSS JOIN params) SELECT * FROM result

queries.name: member_product_detail_base_monthly_cost_anomaly
queries.description: Detect abnormal change in daily product cost compared to 30-day rolling average
queries.query: <YOUR FULL MONTHLY COST QUERY AS PROVIDED>

queries.name: member_product_detail_base_term_effective_date_validation
queries.description: Validate term_effective_date is parsable, not a sentinel value, and within the allowed date window (2 years back to 6 months forward) for yesterday's records
queries.query: WITH params AS (SELECT date_add('year', -2, current_date) AS min_allowed_date, date_add('month', 6, current_date) AS max_allowed_date, DATE '0001-01-01' AS sentinel_min, DATE '9999-12-31' AS sentinel_max, 0.0 AS invalid_threshold), today_rows AS (SELECT * FROM membership_base_prod.member_product_detail_base WHERE substr(cast(load_timestamp AS varchar),1,10) = cast(date_add('day',-1,current_date) AS varchar)), normalized AS (SELECT *, TRY_CAST(term_effective_date AS date) AS term_eff_dt FROM today_rows), invalid_rows AS (SELECT CASE WHEN term_eff_dt IS NULL THEN 'UNPARSABLE' ELSE NULL END AS reason_unparsable, CASE WHEN term_eff_dt = params.sentinel_min OR term_eff_dt = params.sentinel_max THEN 'SENTINEL_DATE' ELSE NULL END AS reason_sentinel, CASE WHEN term_eff_dt IS NOT NULL AND (term_eff_dt < params.min_allowed_date OR term_eff_dt > params.max_allowed_date) THEN 'OUT_OF_WINDOW' ELSE NULL END AS reason_out_of_window FROM normalized CROSS JOIN params WHERE term_eff_dt IS NULL OR term_eff_dt = params.sentinel_min OR term_eff_dt = params.sentinel_max OR term_eff_dt < params.min_allowed_date OR term_eff_dt > params.max_allowed_date), summary AS (SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM normalized) AS total_today, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM invalid_rows) AS invalid_count, CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM normalized) = 0 THEN 0.0 ELSE CAST((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM invalid_rows) AS double) / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM normalized) END AS invalid_fraction FROM params) SELECT s.total_today, s.invalid_count, ROUND(100.0 * s.invalid_fraction, 2) AS invalid_pct, CASE WHEN s.total_today = 0 THEN 'NO_DATA' WHEN s.invalid_fraction <= params.invalid_threshold THEN 'PASS' ELSE 'FAIL' END AS status, params.min_allowed_date, params.max_allowed_date, params.sentinel_min, params.sentinel_max FROM summary s CROSS JOIN params

queries.name: member_product_detail_base_rolling_avg_60day_volume
queries.description: Validate yesterday's record volume against the 60-day rolling daily average; fails if deviation exceeds ±15%
queries.query: WITH t_today AS (SELECT * FROM membership_base_prod.member_product_detail_base WHERE substr(cast(load_timestamp AS varchar),1,10) = cast(date_add('day',-1,current_date) AS varchar)), today_count AS (SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt_today FROM t_today), daily_counts_60 AS (SELECT CAST(substr(cast(load_timestamp AS varchar),1,10) AS date) AS dt, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM membership_base_prod.member_product_detail_base WHERE CAST(substr(cast(load_timestamp AS varchar),1,10) AS date) BETWEEN date_add('day',-60,current_date) AND date_add('day',-1,current_date) GROUP BY 1), rolling_stats AS (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(cnt),0) AS total_in_60, COUNT(*) AS days_with_data, CAST(COALESCE(SUM(cnt),0) AS double) / 60.0 AS avg_per_day_in_60_full_window FROM daily_counts_60) SELECT tc.cnt_today AS today_count, rs.avg_per_day_in_60_full_window AS rolling_avg_60, CASE WHEN rs.avg_per_day_in_60_full_window = 0 THEN CASE WHEN tc.cnt_today = 0 THEN 0.0 ELSE 100.0 END ELSE ROUND(100.0 * (tc.cnt_today - rs.avg_per_day_in_60_full_window) / rs.avg_per_day_in_60_full_window, 2) END AS pct_difference, CASE WHEN rs.avg_per_day_in_60_full_window = 0 AND tc.cnt_today > 0 THEN 'FAIL' WHEN ABS(CASE WHEN rs.avg_per_day_in_60_full_window = 0 THEN CASE WHEN tc.cnt_today = 0 THEN 0.0 ELSE 100.0 END ELSE 100.0 * (tc.cnt_today - rs.avg_per_day_in_60_full_window) / rs.avg_per_day_in_60_full_window END) > 15.0 THEN 'FAIL' ELSE 'PASS' END AS status, rs.total_in_60, rs.days_with_data FROM today_count tc CROSS JOIN rolling_stats rs

queries.name: household_present_in_datalake_not_in_base
queries.description: Validate that all household records present in datalake today also exist in household_members_base using a normalized business key
queries.query: WITH t1_raw AS (SELECT * FROM membership_datalake_prod.mrd_mbrshp_household WHERE substring(cast(load_timestamp AS varchar),1,10)=cast(current_date AS varchar) OR substring(cast(updated_timestamp AS varchar),1,10)=cast(current_date AS varchar)), t1 AS (SELECT *, concat_ws('^', lower(coalesce(trim(fk_acl_club_c),'')), coalesce(trim(mbrshp_n),''), coalesce(trim(fk_bill_cus_sys_id),''), coalesce(cast(try_cast(eff_d AS date) AS varchar),''), coalesce(cast(try_cast(cur_term_exp_d AS date) AS varchar),'')) AS concat_key FROM t1_raw), t2_raw AS (SELECT * FROM membership_base_prod.household_members_base WHERE (substring(cast(load_timestamp AS varchar),1,10)=cast(current_date AS varchar) OR substring(cast(update_timestamp AS varchar),1,10)=cast(current_date AS varchar)) AND latest_record_indicator='Y'), t2 AS (SELECT *, concat_ws('^', lower(coalesce(trim(membership_club_code),'')), coalesce(trim(membership_number),''), coalesce(trim(bill_customer_id),''), coalesce(cast(try_cast(household_effective_date AS date) AS varchar),''), coalesce(cast(try_cast(current_term_expiration_date AS date) AS varchar),'')) AS concat_key FROM t2_raw) SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM t1 LEFT JOIN t2 ON t1.concat_key=t2.concat_key WHERE t2.concat_key IS NULL

queries.name: household_exact_business_key_duplicates
queries.description: Detect duplicate household records based on exact business key for today
queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM (SELECT 1 FROM membership_base_prod.household_members_base WHERE (substring(cast(load_timestamp AS varchar),1,10)=cast(current_date AS varchar) OR substring(cast(update_timestamp AS varchar),1,10)=cast(current_date AS varchar)) AND latest_record_indicator='Y' GROUP BY membership_club_code, membership_number, role_code, customer_id, membership_card_number, member_effective_date HAVING COUNT(*)>1) d

queries.name: household_completeness_mandatory_fields
queries.description: Validate mandatory household fields are populated for today
queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM membership_base_prod.household_members_base WHERE (substring(cast(load_timestamp AS varchar),1,10)=cast(current_date AS varchar) OR substring(cast(update_timestamp AS varchar),1,10)=cast(current_date AS varchar)) AND latest_record_indicator='Y' AND (membership_club_code IS NULL OR membership_number IS NULL OR role_code IS NULL OR customer_id IS NULL OR membership_card_number IS NULL)

queries.name: household_minmax_year_validation
queries.description: Validate tenure and join years are populated and within acceptable range (1900–2100)
queries.query: WITH params AS (SELECT '1900' AS min_year,'2100' AS max_year) SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM membership_base_prod.household_members_base t CROSS JOIN params WHERE (substring(cast(load_timestamp AS varchar),1,10)=cast(current_date AS varchar) OR substring(cast(update_timestamp AS varchar),1,10)=cast(current_date AS varchar)) AND (tenure_aaa_year IS NULL OR club_join_year IS NULL OR club_join_year<params.min_year OR club_join_year>params.max_year OR aaa_join_year IS NULL OR aaa_join_year<params.min_year OR aaa_join_year>params.max_year)

queries.name: household_invalid_role_code
queries.description: Validate role_code values for today's household records
queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM membership_base_prod.household_members_base WHERE (substring(cast(load_timestamp AS varchar),1,10)=cast(current_date AS varchar) OR substring(cast(update_timestamp AS varchar),1,10)=cast(current_date AS varchar)) AND (role_code IS NULL OR role_code NOT IN ('00','01','02','03','04','05','06'))

queries.name: household_invalid_bill_plan_type
queries.description: Validate bill_plan_type_code is populated and valid for today's household records
queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM membership_base_prod.household_members_base WHERE (substring(cast(load_timestamp AS varchar),1,10)=cast(current_date AS varchar) OR substring(cast(update_timestamp AS varchar),1,10)=cast(current_date AS varchar)) AND (bill_plan_type_code IS NULL OR bill_plan_type_code NOT IN ('AM','AC'))

queries.name: household_rolling_avg_60day_volume
queries.description: Validate today's household volume against the 60-day rolling daily average (±15%)
queries.query: WITH t_today AS (SELECT * FROM membership_base_prod.household_members_base WHERE substr(cast(load_timestamp AS varchar),1,10)=cast(current_date AS varchar) OR substr(cast(update_timestamp AS varchar),1,10)=cast(current_date AS varchar)), today_count AS (SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt_today FROM t_today), daily_counts_60 AS (SELECT CAST(substr(cast(coalesce(load_timestamp,update_timestamp) AS varchar),1,10) AS date) AS dt, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM membership_base_prod.household_members_base WHERE CAST(substr(cast(coalesce(load_timestamp,update_timestamp) AS varchar),1,10) AS date) BETWEEN date_add('day',-60,current_date) AND date_add('day',-1,current_date) GROUP BY 1), rolling_stats AS (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(cnt),0) AS total_in_60, COUNT(*) AS days_with_data, CAST(COALESCE(SUM(cnt),0) AS double)/60.0 AS avg_per_day_in_60_full_window FROM daily_counts_60) SELECT tc.cnt_today AS today_count, rs.avg_per_day_in_60_full_window AS rolling_avg_60, CASE WHEN rs.avg_per_day_in_60_full_window=0 THEN CASE WHEN tc.cnt_today=0 THEN 0.0 ELSE 100.0 END ELSE ROUND(100.0*(tc.cnt_today-rs.avg_per_day_in_60_full_window)/rs.avg_per_day_in_60_full_window,2) END AS pct_difference, CASE WHEN rs.avg_per_day_in_60_full_window=0 AND tc.cnt_today>0 THEN 'FAIL' WHEN ABS(CASE WHEN rs.avg_per_day_in_60_full_window=0 THEN CASE WHEN tc.cnt_today=0 THEN 0.0 ELSE 100.0 END ELSE 100.0*(tc.cnt_today-rs.avg_per_day_in_60_full_window)/rs.avg_per_day_in_60_full_window END)>15.0 THEN 'FAIL' ELSE 'PASS' END AS status, rs.total_in_60, rs.days_with_data FROM today_count tc CROSS JOIN rolling_stats rs
